name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-9
title: repo-permissions: convert from skill to command, rename with rabbit- prefix, evaluate consolidation into rabbit-cage surface
description:
Currently repo-permissions is surfaced as a skill (.claude/skills/repo-permissions/SKILL.md). Issues:
1. It should be a command under .claude/commands/ (user-invocable via /rabbit-permissions lock|unlock) rather than a skill — skills are for Claude-initiated actions, commands are for user-initiated ones.
2. The name needs a rabbit- prefix for consistency with other commands (rabbit-config, rabbit-refresh, etc.).
3. Evaluate whether the build-contract copy-file entry and drift detection should fold into the existing rabbit-cage surface entry rather than being a separate tracked artifact.
The underlying script (rabbit-cage/scripts/repo-permissions.py) stays where it is — only the surface declaration and command file need to change.

history.note: Audit complete: all 14 artifacts under .claude/skills/, .claude/commands/, .claude/agents/ have copy-file entries in build-contract.json with check_on_stop: true. Coverage was achieved incrementally across prior PRs (#85-#90). No gaps found.
